name: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek AI large language model API. OpenAI-compatible chat completions and model listing. Supports deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner models.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Create a chat completion using DeepSeek models. Send a conversation of messages and receive an AI-generated response. Supports deepseek-chat (standard) and deepseek-reasoner (thinking/reasoning mode). The API is OpenAI-compatible.

model.description: The model to use for chat completion. 'deepseek-chat' for standard mode, 'deepseek-reasoner' for thinking/reasoning mode.

messages.description: Array of message objects representing the conversation history.

role.description: The role of the message author.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response. The total of input + output tokens is limited by the model's context length.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Lower values make output more focused and deterministic, higher values make it more random.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. The model considers tokens with top_p cumulative probability mass. Alternative to temperature.

stream.description: If true, partial message deltas will be sent as server-sent events. If false, the complete response is returned at once.

stop.description: Up to 16 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on their frequency in the text so far. Range -2.0 to 2.0.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far. Range -2.0 to 2.0.

response_format.description: Specify the output format. Use {"type": "json_object"} to enforce valid JSON output.

type.description: The format type for the response.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all available DeepSeek models. Returns model IDs, object type, and ownership information. Currently available models include deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner.
